dimensions.name: Energy Level
dimensions.description: How much activation and arousal the content produces. Low (0.0) = calm, meditative. High (1.0) = intense, adrenaline-pumping.

dimensions.name: Cognitive Load
dimensions.description: How much attention and thinking the content requires. Low (0.0) = passive, easy watching. High (1.0) = dense, technical, demanding.

dimensions.name: Motivation Score
dimensions.description: How much the content drives action and ambition. Low (0.0) = neutral. High (1.0) = intensely motivating, call-to-action.

dimensions.name: Humor Score
dimensions.description: How funny or entertaining the content is. Low (0.0) = serious, no humor. High (1.0) = comedy-focused, hilarious.

dimensions.name: Skill Transfer Score
dimensions.description: How much practical, actionable knowledge is transferred. Low (0.0) = entertainment only. High (1.0) = tutorial, step-by-step instruction.

dimensions.name: Production Quality
dimensions.description: Overall production value including audio, video, and editing quality. Low (0.0) = raw, unedited. High (1.0) = professional studio quality.
